response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a single, continuous musical performance of 'MIR//or' by Ayunda Risu, composed by Feryquitous. 2. Performed a web search for 'Ayunda Risu MIR//or lyrics' and found the official lyrics on Lyrical Nonsense. 3. Mapped the song performance to the video timeline (00:00-05:05) and split it into two scenes based on the major visual shift at 04:45. 4. Included the complete lyrics in both scenes as requested.
response.global_summary: An official music video for the song 'MIR//or' performed by Ayunda Risu, featuring animation of her singing and a mascot character in a burning village setting, transitioning to a peaceful scene.

scenes.description: The song 'MIR//or' is performed by Ayunda Risu while a giant mascot character stands in a burning village. The scene features intense animation and lighting effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
If I love you, would you love me too
Utara ku kecil dahulu
The love will last it will
Selamanya ‘ku kan peduli, right?

Through me (to me)
Broken thing have I become
And you see, life is pain (love is paradise)
Truly I had enough (i just never had enough)

Ordinary day it seems
The clouds of love (ordinary) in the sky
Painted colors in my (never meant for me) paradise
Titik hujan menyegarkan (membasahi) segala
Bunga-bunga emosi manusia (luka-luka emosi manusia)
Mekar dan berkembang (terlelap) megah selamanya

Ah!

Will I love you like you love me too
Utara mu lebih dahulu
The love will last it will
Selamanya ‘ku kan ada di sini

To me
Enchanting have I become
And you see life is fair (love is a façade)
Truly I am enough (i will never am enough)

Ordinary day it seems
The cloud of lies (ordinary) in the sky
Painted color in my (never meant for me in) paradise
Titik hujan menghapuskan (membasahi) segala
Luka, duka emosi manusia (bunga-bunga emosi manusia)
Rapuh dan terjatuh (bermegah), lelah di dunia

The halo (hollow)
Lingers on my ego (ego)
Blinding light that radiates (only light within me)
Evaporates the sad in me (evaporate, leaving me)
A soundless whisper
Follow me (don’t follow me), never let go
Bahagia (bahagia) jadi nyata (harapnya menjadi hal nyata)
Berdua (ah)

To me (to me)
Obsessive have I become
And you see life is fair (love is a façade)
Never I had enough (i will never give enough)

Ordinary I will be
The cloud and the color (ordinary) of rainbow
Start to show in my paradise (was it meant for me)
Titik hujan meleburkan (membasahi) segala
Luka, duka emosi manusia (bunga-bunga emosi manusia)
Rapuh dan terlalu (merekah) lelah di dunia

Hi, finally I can see you (nice to meet you)
Awan gelap yang membentuk aku (membawa ku)
Titik hujan membasuh (bersih)
Bunga-bunga perasaan (suka dan duka perasaan)
Dan melebur (menjadi) satu warna yang bermakna
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If I love you, would you love me too?
My northern star, small in the past
The love will last, it will
Forever, will you care, right?

Through me (to me)
Broken thing have I become
And you see, life is pain (love is paradise)
Truly I had enough (I just never had enough)

Ordinary day, it seems
The clouds of love (ordinary) in the sky
Painted colors in my (never meant for me) paradise
Raindrops refreshing (wetting) everything
Flowers of human emotion (wounds of human emotion)
Blooming and growing grandly (asleep) forever

Ah!

Will I love you like you love me too?
My northern star, more in the past
The love will last, it will
Forever, I will be here

To me
Enchanting have I become
And you see, life is fair (love is a facade)
Truly I am enough (I will never be enough)

Ordinary day, it seems
The cloud of lies (ordinary) in the sky
Painted color in my (never meant for me in) paradise
Raindrops erasing everything (wetting)
Wounds, sorrows of human emotion (flowers of human emotion)
Fragile and fallen (grandly), tired in this world

The halo (hollow)
Lingers on my ego (ego)
Blinding light that radiates (only light within me)
Evaporates the sad in me (evaporate, leaving me)
A soundless whisper (soundless whisper)
Follow me (don't follow me), never let go
Happiness (happiness) becomes real (the hope becomes a reality)
Together (ah)

To me (to me)
Obsessive have I become
And you see
Life is fair (love is a facade)
Never I (I will never)
Had enough (give enough)

Ordinary I will be
The cloud and the color of rainbow (ordinary)
Start to show in my paradise (was it meant for me)
Raindrops dissolving everything (wetting)
Wounds, sorrows of human emotion (flowers of human emotion)
Fragile and too tired (blooming) in this world

Hi, finally I can see you (nice to meet you)
Dark clouds that form me (bring me)
Raindrops washing (clean)
Flowers of feelings (joys and sorrows of feelings)
And melting (becoming) into one meaningful color

scenes.description: The music continues as the burning village fades and a rainbow appears over a peaceful bell tower.
